title: Cloudmesh AI Documentation
text: Welcome to the Cloudmesh AI ecosystem. We provide tools for seamless AI orchestration on HPC environments, including NVIDIA DGX Stations and A100/Blackwell clusters.

title: Cloudmesh AI Documentation
text:
Core Projects

AI Shell: A specialized CLI for managing LLMs and RAG workflows.
[Tracker Native]: Mobile-first avian monitoring and triangulation.
[Benchmarks]: Comparative analysis of YOLO models and RAG performance.


[!TIP] Use pip install cloudmesh-cma to get started with the core shell.
